reason: Design system source of truth — defines all token values (colors, spacing, radii, typography, motion, glass effects) that must be migrated to CSS variables
Frontend spec overview — understand the frontend guideline structure
Current styling patterns (inline styles, color palette, style factory functions) — these patterns will be updated to use CSS variables
Quality standards including build verification commands (typecheck, build), dark theme requirements, and the current 'inline styles only' rule that will change
File layout — new styles/ directory and CSS files will be added under src/renderer/
